task_objective: Implement SteamOS Xbox and UWPHook platform gating
design_decisions: Gated Xbox auto-scan UI elements in `src/components.tsx` using `platformCapabilities.supports_xbox_uwphook_auto`.
Added explanatory localized string `xboxAutoScanUnsupported` to English and Italian dictionaries in `src/i18n.ts`.
Imported `getPlatformCapabilities` and guarded Xbox background auto-detection via `fetchAchievements` in `src/steam.ts`.
Gated manual Xbox auto-detect button behavior in `src/components.tsx` using `getPlatformCapabilities()`.
results: All tests and quality gates pass. SteamOS gracefully hides and skips Windows-only Xbox auto-scanning features.
